title: OofMod
description: A PvP mod for 1.8.9 which plays a sound upon an action.
body:
# `OofMod` A mod that plays a sound when you perform a certain action. Usually used to play a random noise when getting a kill on the Hypixel Network. This "revamped" version of the mod also has options to play noises when you get a bed break in Bedwars or when you die.
[![BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fb6621b-811a-473b-9087-c8c42b50e74c.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/deftu) ## Differences from the original mod ```diff + Added Essential. + Rewritten command to use Essential. + Rewritten settings to use Vigilance. + Replaced sound config menu with custom screen using Essential's design. + Added a kill sound type. + Added a death sound type. + Added a bed break sound type. + Improved error handling. - Removed ModCore. - Removed multiple game-breaking bugs. ```
